title: Former Lucha Underground wrestlers react to teaser video
summary: Several former Lucha Underground roster members have reacted to the promotion’s recent social media tease. title: AAA to name new General Manager next month
summary: Lucha Libre AAA is all set to reveal their brand new general manager next month, in May 2026. summary: AAA returns to Fox in Latin America tonight. Tonight’s show was taped on April 11 in Mexico City. title: UFC Fight Night 274 live results: Aljamain Sterling vs. Youssef Zalal

title: Swerve Strickland, Raquel Rodriguez announce picks at NFL Draft
summary: Swerve Strickland and Raquel Rodriguez appeared at the NFL Draft on Saturday. Strickland announced the Jacksonville Jaguars’ pick in the fourth round of the draft in Pittsburgh.
